title: Cobblemon Shoulder Mounts
description: A datapack to add some more Cobblemon to the shoulder mounts :D
body:
A small datapack that adds more Pokémons to the "Shoulder Mounts" already available in Cobblemon. These adds no effects ; I just want to walk around with my favorite starter on my shoulder ! 
![A cobblemon Mudkip and Buneary standing on each shoulders of a minecraft person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d08c1da0bcfd4cbeb494732f4d45715e7b711e29_0.webp)
See the gallery for more examples

Disclaimer : I am no modeler/animator, so the pokémons don't have special shoulder poses/animations, only their "ground idle" or "sleeping" ones. It is necessary to put this pack in BOTH the datapacks and ressources packs folders, as otherwise some pokémons "clip" in your head.

If you play on server : The server needs the Datapack in its world folder, and each player needs to put it in their ressource packs folder.

This pack adds the following Pokémons to the shoulder mounts :
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**V1 :**
- Azurill (From AllTheMons 2.3)
- Bulbasaur
- Buneary
- Chespin
- Chikorita
- Chimchar
- Cyndaquil
- Ditto
- Drifloon
- Espurr (From AllTheMons 2.3)
- Fennekin
- Froakie
- Fuecoco
- Grookey
- Horsea
- Jirachi (From MysticMons)
- Klink
- Magnemite
- Manaphy (From AllTheMons 2.3)
- Minccino (From AllTheMons 2.3)
- Mudkip
- Natu
- Oddish
- Omanyte
- Oshawott
- Phione (From AllTheMons 2.3)
- Piplup
- Porygon
- Purrloin
- Quaxly
- Rattata
- Rowlet
- Scorbunny
- Shinx
- Snivy
- Sobble
- Togepi (From HiddenMons)
- Torchic
- Treecko
- Victini (From MysticMons)
- Wurmple (From Wurmple pack)

Bonus ! Wailord. For the MemeTM

</details>
